enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder on April 26, 2017, reporting he just returned from the dentist with a numb mouth. He describes his ongoing work on a Roman timeline website he has been building since 2011, his plan to grind on it through the week and reassess monetization at the start of May, and his discomfort from smoking pipe resin due to no regular cannabis being available.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: strongly pro-legalization; believes illegal status forced him to smoke harmful resin for years and damaged his health
regrets it; says it causes him severe asthma and he won't do it anymore
committed to pushing hard on it this week before pivoting back to money-making efforts in May

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I live in Boulder.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Today is Wednesday, April 26th at 10 o'clock a.m.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The side of my mouth is totally numb, making it look lopsided.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I tripped and got a chip fix.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was working until one in the morning yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I spent time copying and pacing events from years for my timeline.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I wonder if Dreamweaver has dropdown menus to help with my timeline.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to work on my timeline for the rest of the week.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I will re-evaluate my progress at the beginning of May.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to figure out ads to make money.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I am learning a lot by building my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I haven't worked on my 2011 timeline but am picking it up again.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I felt really sick yesterday because I didn't smoke weed until the day before.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Scraping my pipe and smoking resin gives me bad asthma.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Smoking resin makes me feel sick and gives me a metallic, constricting feeling in my mouth.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I used to smoke resin a lot before weed became legal.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I resent people who want to keep weed illegal.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Smoking regular green weed out of a bong is not bad for your lungs.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I still have asthma and feel sick, so I won't smoke resin anymore.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I expect my mind to clear up and my health to improve if I stop smoking resin.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm curious if I'll be able to work on my timeline all day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: If I burn out, I might incorporate exercise instead of smoking weed.

transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder V-LOG. It's Wednesday, April 26th today at 10 o'clock AM. I just
Got back from the dentist. This side of my mouth is totally numb, so maybe that's why
My mouth may be looking a little bit lopsided. I got my chip fixed, so that's pretty cool.
No more chip. I should probably whiten my teeth though now. So yesterday I was working
All day long until 1 in the morning or something in my room in timeline, just doing random things.
I finished the day off by just going through all the years and just copying and pasting
Events from the years because Wikipedia, they didn't have this in 2011, but now they have
Where you just type in the year and it says events, it helps out. And then I'll go and
Fix, condense the words. I'd like to see if Dreamweaver has a drop-down thing, drop-down
Menus, and maybe I could, I mean, I'd eventually put that and, you know, you mouse over and
Then it explains everything, but I don't know when I'll do that. So today I'm going to work
On, well, not just today, but the rest of the week. Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday,
And Sunday. Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday. Next five days, just to see how far ahead I
Can get. And then next Monday, the beginning of May, I'll reevaluate the situation, back
Up and do, try to do stuff to make money. Figure out this AdSense, hook up the AdSense and,
Oh yeah, and type surface level words to make my website presentable. Yeah, but for now I'm
Just doing Rome. I'm learning so much though about Rome by building this, the Roman, this
Website. I haven't worked on my timeline, my Roman timeline since 2011. So, but I'm picking
It up just like I left off. Pretty much remember everything. So it's pretty cool. Um, I felt
Really sick yesterday because I didn't smoke weed until, since day before yesterday. But,
Um, you know, I was scraping my pipe with all the resin and smoking that and that gives me
Really bad asthma. Like really bad asthma. And then it makes me feel really sick. At least
My mouth, mouth feel metallic and like, like constricting and ugh, so bad. So anyways, there's
No more of that stuff to smoke. I can't believe I used to smoke that so much before weed actually
Became legal. Fuck you to anybody who wants to keep weed legal, man. You probably shorten
My life by like 20 fucking years. Um, by having to smoke all that crap all those years. Cause
If you smoke just regular green weed out of a bomb, like it's not bad for your lungs at
All. Um, so anyways, um, uh, so yeah, I still have asthma right now and I felt sick. So I'm
Not, I'm not going to do any more of that shit. Um, and I'll start to feel better. Um, then
My mind will clear up and I'll do better on the timeline. I'm curious to see if I'll be able
To work on it though all day long. Um, but that's not a big deal though, because if I
Burn out, then I can just, instead of smoking more weed, I'll just, maybe that's when I'll
Incorporate the exercise, but I think I've done enough talking for now 335. Let's get
Going. Let's get working. Peace out.
